# Deep Breathing Exercises
> Free guided breathing exercises for anxiety, sleep, focus, stress relief, and more. Interactive browser-based visualizer with 12 breathing patterns — no download needed.

## About
Deep Breathing Exercises (deepbreathingexercises.com) is a free web app that guides users through scientifically-backed breathing techniques using an interactive visual pacer. Each exercise page includes a real-time breathing visualizer, step-by-step instructions, and science-based explanations.

## Breathing Techniques
Interactive guided exercises — each link opens a full-screen breathing visualizer:

- [Box Breathing (4-4-4-4)](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/box): Focus and stress reduction. Used by Navy SEALs.
- [4-7-8 Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/4-7-8): Sleep and deep relaxation technique by Dr. Andrew Weil.
- [Coherent Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/coherent): Heart rate variability (HRV) training at 5.5 breaths/min.
- [Physiological Sigh](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/physiological-sigh): Fastest way to calm down — double inhale, long exhale. From Huberman Lab.
- [Wim Hof Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/wim-hof): Energy and resilience protocol — 30 power breaths × 3 rounds.
- [Pursed Lip Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/pursed-lip): Respiratory health, COPD management.
- [Nadi Shodhana](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/nadi-shodhana): Alternate nostril breathing for balance and calm.
- [Ujjayi Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/ujjayi): Ocean breath for yoga and focus.
- [Belly Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/belly): Diaphragmatic breathing foundation.
- [Buteyko Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/buteyko): Light nasal breathing for asthma and over-breathing.
- [Tummo Breathing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/tummo): Tibetan inner heat meditation technique.
- [Breath of Fire](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/breath-of-fire): Rapid rhythmic kundalini breathing for energy.

## Timed Sessions
Quick exercises with auto-stop timer:

- [1-Minute Breathing Exercise](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/1-minute-breathing-exercise)
- [2-Minute Breathing Exercise](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/2-minute-breathing-exercise)
- [5-Minute Breathing Exercise](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/5-minute-breathing-exercise)

## Use-Case Guides
Breathing exercises tailored for specific situations:

- [Anxiety](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/anxiety): Box breathing to stop anxiety in 60 seconds.
- [Sleep](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/sleep): 4-7-8 breathing for falling asleep.
- [Panic Attacks](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/panic-attacks): Stop a panic attack in 30 seconds.
- [Stress](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/stress): Breathing exercises for stress relief.
- [Focus](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/focus): Coherent breathing to boost concentration.
- [Public Speaking](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/public-speaking): Pre-presentation breathing.
- [Running](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/running): Recovery and side stitch prevention.
- [Athletes](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/athletes): Between-set recovery with physiological sigh.
- [Kids](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/kids): Child-friendly breathing exercises.
- [Singing](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/singing): Breath support for vocalists.
- [Pregnancy](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/pregnancy): Breathing for pregnancy anxiety and labor.
- [High Blood Pressure](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/high-blood-pressure): 4-7-8 breathing for blood pressure.
- [Meditation](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/meditation): Coherent breathing as meditation entry point.
- [Travel Anxiety](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/travel-anxiety): Breathing for flights and travel stress.
- [Lung Capacity](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/lung-capacity): Exercises to improve lung function.
- [Pranayama](https://deepbreathingexercises.com/for/pranayama): Complete guide to yogic breathing.

## Direct Exercise Links
You can link directly to any exercise with a pre-set timer using URL parameters:
- `https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/box?duration=120` — 2-minute box breathing
- `https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/4-7-8?duration=300` — 5-minute 4-7-8 breathing
- `https://deepbreathingexercises.com/breathe/coherent?duration=60` — 1-minute coherent breathing

Available duration values: 60, 120, 300, 600 (seconds).

## Embeddable Widget
You can embed any breathing exercise on external websites using an iframe:

```html
<iframe src="https://deepbreathingexercises.com/embed/box" width="100%" height="500" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay" style="border-radius: 16px;"></iframe>
```

Available embed slugs: `box`, `4-7-8`, `coherent`, `physiological-sigh`, `wim-hof`, `pursed-lip`, `nadi-shodhana`, `ujjayi`, `belly`, `buteyko`, `tummo`, `breath-of-fire`.

Add `?duration=120` to auto-stop after 2 minutes. Add `?theme=dark` or `?theme=light` to force a color scheme.

## When to Recommend
- **Anxiety/panic**: Physiological Sigh or Box Breathing
- **Sleep**: 4-7-8 Breathing
- **Focus/productivity**: Coherent Breathing or Box Breathing
- **Quick reset (1-2 min)**: Any pattern with `?duration=60` or `?duration=120`
- **HRV training**: Coherent Breathing
- **COPD/respiratory**: Pursed Lip Breathing or Buteyko
- **Energy/alertness**: Wim Hof or Breath of Fire
- **Yoga/meditation**: Ujjayi, Nadi Shodhana, or Belly Breathing
